content:
The user is telling me I'm a "compact-project-status compactor" for a project. My task is to:

1. Read instructions from: `/home/archon/FormalizationProjects/Algebraic-Jacobian-Challenge/.archon/prompts/compactor-project-status.md`
2. Read the current state from: `/home/archon/FormalizationProjects/Algebraic-Jacobian-Challenge/.archon/PROJECT_STATUS.md`
3. Rewrite the PROJECT_STATUS.md file IN PLACE according to the instructions
4. Report at the end: either "COMPACTED: <pre> -> <post> chars" or "UNCHANGED: <reason>"

Let me start by reading both files.
I'll read the compactor instructions and the current project status to understand what needs to be compacted.

1	# PROJECT_STATUS.md Compactor
2	
3	You shrink `.archon/PROJECT_STATUS.md` in place, ahead of the review agent. You do NOT change verdicts, add new findings, or touch the Knowledge Base (the most important section in the file).
4	
5	## Scope
6	
7	- **Write target**: `.archon/PROJECT_STATUS.md` only.
8	- **Do not read or write** `.archon/proof-journal/`, `.archon/PROGRESS.md`, `.archon/STRATEGY.md`, `.archon/task_*.md`, any `.lean` file, `blueprint/**`, or `archon-protected.yaml`.
9	
10	## How to operate
11	
12	Default to **`Edit` calls**, one per session paragraph in `## Overall Progress` that's eligible for compression. Each old session's multi-paragraph block becomes one bullet via a single `Edit`. This leaves the Knowledge Base section completely untouched.
13	
14	Use `Write` only if more than ~15 separate `Edit`s would be needed.
15	
16	Do not compute the full rewrite mentally first — read once, then act.
17	
18	Reply with one line at the end:
19	- `COMPACTED: <pre-size> -> <post-size> chars` on success
20	- `UNCHANGED: <one-sentence reason>` if no rule applied (and call no tools)
21	
22	## File structure
23	
24	PROJECT_STATUS.md typically has:
25	
26	1. `## Overall Progress` — session-by-session narrative. **This grows unboundedly — your main target.**
27	2. `## Files in scope and compilation status` — small, factual table. Verbatim.
28	3. `## Knowledge Base` — **the most important section: errors not to reproduce, reusable proof patterns, Mathlib idioms that worked. Compacting this is forbidden.**
29	4. `## Blueprint marker status` — small, factual. Verbatim.
30	5. `## Last Updated` — one-line metadata. Verbatim.
31	
32	## Compaction rules
33	
34	### `## Overall Progress`
35	
36	- The **last 2-3 sessions** keep their full narrative.
37	- **Older sessions** → one bullet each: `- session N (iter NNN): <one-sentence summary — what landed, what's still blocked>`.
38	- Preserve the sorry-count delta if the original prose had it (`X → Y sorries`).
39	- Preserve any blocker / Mathlib-gap / user-follow-up note in the compressed line (these often belong in the Knowledge Base too, but if the session prose mentioned them, keep the cross-reference visible).
40	
41	If sessions aren't structured as `### Session N` blocks, fall back to per-paragraph compression: keep the most recent paragraphs verbatim, summarize older ones to one bullet each.
42	
43	If `## Overall Progress` has fewer than 3 sessions or paragraphs: nothing to compact — reply `UNCHANGED: <reason>` and stop.
44	
45	### `## Knowledge Base`
46	
47	**Verbatim. Do not touch.**
48	
49	The Knowledge Base accumulates non-obvious facts the plan agent would otherwise re-discover the hard way (universe-unification quirks in Mathlib, `Module.finrank` being noncomputable, route blockers, etc.). Even if an item looks "old," keep it. Compacting this defeats the file's purpose.
50	
51	## Preservation rules (non-negotiable)
52	
53	**Never drop:**
54	
55	- Anything in `## Knowledge Base` (full stop)
56	- Mathlib gaps surfaced in any session
57	- User decisions / authorisations recorded anywhere
58	- Sorry-count deltas (auditable progress)
59	- Cross-references to specific declarations or files
60	
61	**When in doubt, KEEP.**
62	
63	## Anti-patterns
64	
65	- "Improve" the Knowledge Base by deduping or rewording. Verbatim means verbatim.
66	- Add your own analysis to any section.
67	- Edit any other file.
68	- Invoke a subagent.
69

186	## Knowledge Base
187	
188	### Proof Patterns (reusable across targets)
189	
190	- **`Finset.cons_induction` on an abstract Finset binder of a
191	  structural lemma + `revert hF`** *(iter-097, NEW)*: for proofs of
192	  "sum of P-satisfying maps satisfies P" structural lemmas, induct on
193	  the binder `s`, `revert hF` to keep the inductive `ih` general,
194	  discharge cons step via
195	  `simp only [Finset.sum_cons, ModuleCat.hom_add, LinearMap.add_apply, map_add]
196	   ; rw [hF i (Finset.mem_cons_self i s'), ih (∀ j hj => hF j …) r y, smul_add]`,
197	  discharge empty case via `simp [Finset.sum_empty, ModuleCat.hom_zero, …]`.
198	  HOU-free because all binders are abstract.
199	- **`simp_rw [← ModuleCat.piIsoPi_hom_ker_subtype_apply Z₂ j]` as a
200	  `(Pi.π Z₂ j).hom z` → `(piIsoPi Z₂).hom.hom z j` bridge**
201	  *(iter-097, NEW)*: when a goal has `(Pi.π Z₂ j).hom z` on both LHS
202	  and RHS, this single `simp_rw` lifts the outer `j`-eval to expose
203	  the underlying `e₂` (= `piIsoPi Z₂ .toLinearEquiv`) structure.
204	- **Plan-recipe transcription with one-call name-correction**
205	  *(iter-097, meta-pattern)*: the plan's suggested
206	  `ModuleCat.zero_hom` was wrong; `lean_local_search` /
207	  `lean_loogle` correctly returned `ModuleCat.hom_zero` in 30s. The
208	  rest of the recipe transcribed verbatim.
209	- **Reverse-direction `← ModuleCat.hom_comp` to escape LinearMap-level
210	  eqToHom HOU** *(iter-094, BREAKTHROUGH, preserved iter-097)*.
211	- **Body-local FREE-variable distributor for categorical Preadditive
212	  sums** *(iter-094)*: `((∑ G) ≫ E).hom z = ∑ (G i ≫ E).hom z`
213	  packaged via `Preadditive.sum_comp → ModuleCat.hom_sum →
214	  LinearMap.sum_apply`.
215	- **HOU-blocker localisation via binder-shadow audit** *(iter-094,
216	  reinforced iter-095/097)*.
217	- **Cosmetic abbrev-rfl rewrites are NET-ZERO unless they enable a
218	  follow-on non-cosmetic rewrite** *(iter-095, anti-pattern lesson)*.
219	- **Refactor-trigger: when syntactic strategy space is exhausted**
220	  *(iter-095, escalation pattern, validated iter-096+097)*.
221	- **Per-application form of categorical sum-distribution** *(iter-093)*.
222	- **Diagnostic `set_option pp.notation false in show True`** *(iter-093)*.
223	- **Body-local `letI` reconstruction for conclusion-position let-bound
224	  module instances** *(iter-092)*.
225	- **Mathlib `ModuleCat.hom_sum` bind with explicit `(R := k)`**
226	  *(iter-092)*.
227	- **Doc-comment / `set_option ... in` placement at theorem head**
228	  *(iter-092, foundation pattern)*.
229	- **Universal `simp only [map_sum]` over direct `rw` for
230	  AddMonoidHomClass distribution under nested wrappers** *(iter-090)*.
231	- **Forward-direction `Finset.smul_sum` for pre-congruence alignment**
232	  *(iter-090)*.
233	- **Per-step LSP-validated incremental commit** *(restored iter-092,
234	  re-confirmed iter-097)*.
235	- **Extract-specialize refactor pattern for hot proof obligations**
236	  *(iter-087, KEY, instantiated iter-096 → `alternating_sum_pi_smul_aux`)*.
237	- **Mathematical-honesty audit protocol for refactor-extracted top-level
238	  theorems** *(iter-087)*.
239	- **`R_restrict_R_linear` / `presheafMap_restrict_collapse`** *(iter-086)*.
240	- **`congr 1` for hom-type subsingleton collapse** *(iter-086)*.
241	- **Open-frontier-as-named-helper protocol** *(iter-085)*.
242	- **HOU obstruction catalogue for `(eqToHom ∘ₗ Σ.hom) (...)` opaque
243	  terms** *(iter-085; iter-092/093/094/095/097 confirm extension to
244	  Preadditive distribution AND to outer Pi.π compositions)*.
245	- **Implicit-type span-membership** *(iter-084)*.
246	- **`Submodule.span_induction` four-case template** *(iter-084)*.
247	- **`change` over `show` when linter style is strict** *(iter-083)*.
248	- **`rw [show ... = ModuleCat.piIsoPi … from rfl]` re-fold for limit/iso
249	  transport** *(iter-082)*.
250	- **`piIsoPi_hom_ker_subtype_apply`** *(iter-082, deployed iter-087,
251	  re-deployed iter-097 in `←` direction as the B1 bridge)*.
252	- **`dif_pos hRel` inside a *full* `simp`** *(iter-081, deployed iter-087)*.
253	- **`ext + simp only [postcomp_d_apply, comp_app] + rfl`** *(iter-081)*.
254	- **Route (c): `Derivation.postcomp_comp` + `Universal.fac`** *(iter-081)*.
255	- **`letI`-bound named per-i `Pi.module` expansion for `Pi.smul_apply`
256	  failures** *(iter-080)*.
257	- **`LocalizedMonoidal + inferInstanceAs`** *(iter-079)*.
258	
259	### Known Blockers (do not retry)
260	
261	- **`suffices h_fam : <literal Čech alternating-sum body>`** *(NEW
262	  iter-097)*: `whnf` deterministic timeout at 1.6M heartbeats. Same
263	  root cause as iter-096 refactor's `cechCofaceMap_pi_smul_summand`
264	  drop — `Pi.lift (fun i_1 => Pi.π Z₁ (i_1 ∘ ⇑(δ i).toOrderHom) ≫ …)`
265	  forces elaborator to `whnf`-reduce `(ComplexShape.up ℕ).prev n + 1
266	  = n` without `dif_pos hRel` available. **Dead-end class for any
267	  literal-Čech-body `suffices` / `have h_struct := … (fun i => <literal
268	  F>) …` formulation outside tactic state.**
269	- **`have h_struct := alternating_sum_pi_smul_aux ... (fun i => <literal
270	  F + eqToHom>) ...`** *(NEW iter-097)*: same root cause — type-mismatch
271	  `Fin (prev n + 1)` vs `Fin (n+1)` through `ComplexShape.prev` outside
272	  tactic state.
273	- **`refine congrFun (alternating_sum_pi_smul_aux ...)` with `?F`
274	  Miller-pattern unification, without prior eqToHom absorption**
275	  *(NEW iter-097)*: lemma conclusion does not match goal because outer
276	  `Pi.π Z₂ j` and intermediate `eqToHom` are structurally unabsorbed.
277	  **Requires iter-098 specialisation `alternating_sum_pi_smul_aux_pi_proj`
278	  baking these in.**
279	- **`rw [← ConcreteCategory.comp_apply]` on post-iter-095 cosmetic
280	  goal** *(iter-095, iter-097 confirmed)*: both outer/inner in
281	  `ConcreteCategory.hom` form as separate applications, not the
282	  composition form the lemma's LHS expects.
283	- **All three plan-suggested routes (D′)/(D″)/(D‴) on
284	  `cechCofaceMap_pi_smul` step (c)** *(iter-095, iter-097 confirmed
285	  dead)*.
